phrases.intent_en: Ask where to hire sun loungers on the main beach
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si noleggiano i lettini sulla spiaggia principale?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see noh-lej-JAH-noh ee let-TEE-nee SOOL-lah SPYAD-jah preen-chee-PAH-leh?
phrases.cultural_note: Positano's main beach (Spiaggia Grande) has both free and rented sections; the private sections offer chairs, parasols and waiter service.

responses.english: Directly from the beach clubs along the seafront.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to take a boat to Capri
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si prende il traghetto per Capri?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see PREN-deh eel trah-GET-toh per KAH-pree?

responses.english: From Positano's pier, tickets at the booth.
responses.phonetic: dal MOH-loh dee poh-zee-TAH-noh, beel-YET-tee al bot-teh-GEE-noh.
responses.local: Dal molo di Positano, biglietti al botteghino.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find a good seafood restaurant on the beach
phrases.text_local: Scusi, c'è un ristorante di pesce sul lungomare?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, cheh oon rees-toh-RAN-teh dee PEH-sheh sool loon-goh-MAH-reh?

responses.english: Yes, La Sponda or Da Adolfo, both excellent.
responses.phonetic: see, lah SPON-dah oh dah ah-DOL-foh, en-TRAM-bee ot-TEE-mee.
responses.local: Sì, La Sponda o Da Adolfo, entrambi ottimi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the beach bars open
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora aprono i lidi?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah AH-proh-noh ee LEE-dee?

responses.english: Usually from nine, depends on the beach club.
responses.phonetic: dee SOH-lee-toh DAL-leh NOH-veh, dee-PEN-deh dal LEE-doh.
responses.local: Di solito dalle nove, dipende dal lido.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to watch the sunset from the beach
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si vede meglio il tramonto dalla spiaggia?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see VEH-deh MEL-lyoh eel trah-MON-toh DAL-lah SPYAD-jah?

responses.english: From the west end, toward Praiano, the light is perfect.
responses.phonetic: DAL-lah PAR-teh oh-VEST, VER-soh prah-YAH-noh, lah LOO-cheh eh per-FET-tah.
responses.local: Dalla parte ovest, verso Praiano, la luce è perfetta.
